interactionPlan.concept: Visualizing the effect of the x-derivative on a 2D Gaussian distribution with sigma=1.

interactions.label: Sigma
interactions.teaches: how changing sigma affects both the Gaussian and its derivative

interactions.label: Show Gaussian/Derivative
interactions.teaches: allows users to compare the original Gaussian with its x-derivative

interactions.label: Animate Derivative
interactions.teaches: illustrates how the x-derivative changes in response to the Gaussian shape

interactions.label: Rotate View
interactions.teaches: helps users understand the 3D shape by examining it from different angles

interactionPlan.camera_suggestion: initial viewpoint should be at a 45-degree angle to appreciate both surface height and spread
interactionPlan.notes: Ensure real-time interaction responsiveness, especially for slider adjustments, to effectively demonstrate changes.

gpt-4o.notes: Good interaction and label placement, though colors diverge from original image.
